content:
Happy Friday 🏁

**Pipeline:** 7 tender opportunities tracked — Nova Scotia Health Authority, NSCC, HRM, Sport Nova Scotia, Hockey NS, NB Dept of Education, and Atlantic University Sport. Combined potential: $285K–$585K. None have been bid on yet — biggest upside is NSHA ($80–150K) and AUS ($60–100K).

**Action items for today:**
• Review tender list and pick top 2–3 to pursue first
• NSHA and HRM are 'watch' status — deadlines TBD, get on their vendor lists now
• Hockey NS Provincials is 'active' — time-sensitive, worth a quick quote

**Social:** Content queue is empty. Great weekend to shoot some behind-the-scenes content for Instagram.

**Email/Klaviyo:** Not connected yet — send Ace your Klaviyo API key to unlock email stats.

**Top 3 priorities:**
1. Pick 2 tenders to bid on and tell Ace to prep the proposals
2. Shoot weekend content (BTS, product shots)
3. Follow up with any open quotes from this week
